titleEn: AgriFood Signals: Anthropic joins carbon removal coalition, Elanco launches venture arm, AeroFarms acquired
titleZh: AgriFood Signals：Anthropic加入碳去除联盟，Elanco成立风险投资部门，AeroFarms被收购
summaryZh: 本文汇总了农业食品科技领域的最新融资、并购、政策与人事动态。亮点包括：Elanco投入2500万美元成立动物健康风险投资部门；AeroFarms被收购并计划扩大分销；欧盟通过新基因组技术法规及植物基和细胞培养肉标签禁令；加拿大启动30亿美元国家粮食安全战略；Solar Foods获8920万美元支持“空气蛋白”工厂等。这些事件反映了精准发酵、基因编辑、土壤健康、碳去除等前沿方向，但对智慧畜牧的直接关联有限。
featuredReason: 本文提供了全球农业食品科技的全景扫描，其中Elanco Ventures的成立、欧盟新基因组技术法规、加拿大粮食安全战略等对智慧畜牧从业者具有宏观参考价值，可帮助把握行业资本流向和政策趋势。
contentFull: AgFunderNews rounds up the most important fundings, mergers, acquisitions, closures, and industry buzz in agtech and foodtech. Funding news 🇳🇱 Vertoro closes €17 million Series B to scale plant-based waste to renewable oil technology One Stop ESG 🇳🇱 Vivici bags $14.4m EIC funding to scale precision-fermented dairy proteins AgFunderNews 🇺🇸 Rainbow Crops raises $11.25m to scale AI-guided multiplex gene editing AgFunderNews 🇫🇮 Raisio secures €4.5 million research investment to transform grain side streams into next-generation fiber ingredients Protein Production Technology 🇩🇪 Seqana raises €3.2 million to expand soil health measurement beyond carbon iGrow News 🇸🇦 KAUST spinout Terraxy raises $3M to scale desert soil regeneration technology Dealroom 🇨🇦 Picketa Systems raises $1.5m to bring crop nutrient testing to the field AgFunderNews 🇨🇭 OneSoil secures €1M to expand AI-powered farming assistant Tech.eu Image credit: iStock M&A, IPOs & partnerships 🇺🇸 Elanco to launch Elanco Ventures with $25 million multi-year commitment to accelerate innovation in animal health Elanco 🇺🇸 AeroFarms acquired by Palm Ventures affiliate, plans expanded distribution and long-term growth Produce Grower 🇸🇬 A factory for climate startups: 100×100’s US$100M bet on 50 companies in SEA, India e27 🇨🇭 🇮🇳 Syngenta signs MoU to be strategic partner in India’s first open-data agricultural ecosystem Annam.AI ESG Today 🇩🇪 🇬🇧 Döhler commits to cocoa-free future with Nukoko acquisition Confectionary News Rami Jokela, CEO, Solar Foods. Image credit: Elaine Watson Funds, grants & accelerators 🇨🇦 Canada launches $3 billion national food security strategy with $750m dedicated to year-round growing iGrow News 🇺🇸 $915M in new funding to drive carbon removal’s next phase of growth Frontier Climate 🇳🇱 The food system needs a rewiring, not a reinvention, Anterra Capital says after $100m raise AgFunderNews 🇺🇸 CDFA and CDRF announce $34 million available for California dairy projects through the Dairy Plus Program ca.gov 🇫🇮 Solar Foods wins $89.2m backing for ‘protein from air’ factory, but final investment decision still pending AgFunderNews People news 🇺🇸 AgriNovus taps Purdue DIAL Ventures veteran to lead innovation efforts across state’s agbioscience ecosystem AgriNovus 🇺🇸 Mondelēz International names Amit Banati executive vice president and chief financial officer Mondelēz 🇮🇹 Nicolò Barbano joins xFarm Technologies as chief of staff LinkedIn Thijs Bosch, CEO, The Protein Brewery. translationZh:
AgFunderNews汇总了农业科技和食品科技领域最重要的融资、并购、关闭以及行业动态。

**融资新闻**

🇳🇱 Vertoro完成1700万欧元B轮融资，用于扩大将植物基废弃物转化为可再生油的技术

🇳🇱 Vivici获得1440万欧元EIC资金，用于扩大精密发酵乳蛋白的生产

🇺🇸 Rainbow Crops筹集1125万美元，用于扩大AI引导的多重基因编辑技术

🇫🇮 Raisio获得450万欧元研究投资，用于将谷物副产品转化为下一代纤维成分

🇩🇪 Seqana筹集320万欧元，用于将土壤健康测量扩展到碳之外

🇸🇦 KAUST衍生公司Terraxy筹集300万美元，用于扩大沙漠土壤再生技术

🇨🇦 Picketa Systems筹集150万美元，将作物养分检测带到田间

🇨🇭 OneSoil获得100万欧元，用于扩展AI驱动的农业助手

**并购、IPO及合作**

🇺🇸 Elanco将推出Elanco Ventures，承诺在多年内投入2500万美元，以加速动物健康领域的创新

🇺🇸 AeroFarms被Palm Ventures关联公司收购，计划扩大分销并实现长期增长

🇸🇬 气候初创企业工厂：100×100的1亿美元押注于东南亚和印度的50家公司

🇨🇭 🇮🇳 先正达签署谅解备忘录，成为印度首个开放数据农业生态系统的战略合作伙伴

🇩🇪 🇬🇧 Döhler通过收购Nukoko承诺走向无可可未来

**基金、资助及加速器**

🇨🇦 加拿大启动30亿美元国家粮食安全战略，其中7.5亿美元用于全年种植

🇺🇸 9.15亿美元新资金推动碳去除的下一阶段增长

🇳🇱 食品系统需要重新布线，而非重新发明，Anterra Capital在筹集1亿美元后表示

🇺🇸 CDFA和CDRF宣布通过Dairy Plus Program为加州乳制品项目提供3400万美元资金

🇫🇮 Solar Foods获得8920万美元支持“空气蛋白”工厂，但最终投资决定仍待定

**人事新闻**

🇺🇸 AgriNovus聘请Purdue DIAL Ventures资深人士领导该州农业生物科学生态系统的创新工作

🇺🇸 Mondelēz International任命Amit Banati为执行副总裁兼首席财务官

🇮🇹 Nicolò Barbano加入xFarm Technologies担任幕僚长

**其他新闻**

🇪🇺 欧洲议会通过关于新基因组技术的规则

🇺🇸 Circularity Fuels将乳制品沼气转化为可持续航空燃料

🇪🇺 欧盟议会以绝大多数通过植物基和细胞培养肉标签禁令

🇫🇷 法国替代肉类全切专家SWAP Food进入司法清算，停止运营

🇪🇸 Heura赢得针对肉类的法律诉讼
author: Jennifer Marston
